key_themes: First quarterly profit with record deliveries and margin expansion
Physical AI, robotics, robotaxi, and autonomous driving leadership
March delivery surge, ambitious 2026 targets, and new model launches
Global expansion (Latin America, Europe, potential Canada) and VW partnership
Analyst Buy ratings with price targets implying 25-35% upside
summary: XPeng delivered its first-ever quarterly profit in Q4 2025 on record vehicle sales, revenue growth, and gross margins reaching 21%, followed by a strong March 2026 rebound (27k+ units, +80% MoM) and full-year 2025 deliveries exceeding 429k. The company is building excitement around its 'Physical AI' ecosystem showcase at the Beijing Auto Show, new models like the GX and G6/P7+, robotics/humanoid ambitions, and international growth including Latin America entry and overseas deliveries up sharply. Analysts maintain a Buy consensus with average targets near $24 (from current ~$18 levels), though investors remain watchful of intense domestic competition, seasonal Q1 softness, and broader China EV/geopolitical risks.
sources: 20+ recent news articles (Yahoo Finance, WSJ, Reuters, MarketBeat, TradingView), 20+ recent X posts (keyword + semantic searches, Apr 2026 focus)
